meta_title: For Freelancers: user onboarding to Solve no portfolio (Advanced Comparison)
meta_description: Learn how to user onboarding and overcome no portfolio. A Advanced-level Comparison using Antigravity and Claude Code.

content.seo_title: For Freelancers: User Onboarding to Solve No Portfolio
content.seo_description: Learn how to use user onboarding to overcome a lack of portfolio. An advanced-level guide using Antigravity and Claude Code for fast, professional delivery.
content.answer_block: To overcome a lack of portfolio, build high-fidelity, interactive user onboarding flows for phantom clients. By mastering complex state management and UX micro-interactions, you demonstrate technical depth that clients crave. Use Antigravity for rapid scaffolding and Claude Code to iterate on polished, production-ready code that proves your professional competence.
content.intro:
The blank screen is the freelancer’s greatest adversary. You have the technical skills, but without a portfolio, you are invisible to high-paying clients who demand proof of execution. You are stuck in a loop of bidding on projects you are overqualified for, only to be rejected by gatekeepers who cannot visualize your capability.

The solution isn't just 'more projects'; it's 'better proof.' By building a sophisticated, high-conversion user onboarding flow, you demonstrate the exact business value clients pay for: user retention and friction reduction. This is your chance to pivot from a developer who just writes code to a product engineer who drives revenue.

steps.title: Defining the User Journey
steps.description: Map out a 3-step onboarding flow that solves a real-world friction point for a hypothetical SaaS product.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Generate a modular React component structure for a 3-step onboarding wizard including state management for form progress and validation.
steps.claude_code_command: claude run 'create onboarding state machine using XState and React'

steps.title: Implementing Interactive Micro-interactions
steps.description: Add Framer Motion animations to make the onboarding feel premium and responsive.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Generate Framer Motion transition variants for onboarding steps, ensuring smooth entry and exit animations.
steps.claude_code_command: claude terminal 'npm install framer-motion' && claude run 'apply motion to onboarding step component'

steps.title: Backend Data Persistence
steps.description: Ensure onboarding progress is saved so users can return to their session.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Create a Supabase-compatible API route for updating user onboarding progress fields in a Postgres database.
steps.claude_code_command: claude run 'create backend endpoint to patch onboarding_status'

steps.title: Edge Case Handling & Error States
steps.description: Professional work is defined by how it handles failure. Build robust error handling.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Generate error handling logic for onboarding form submissions, including toast notifications for network timeouts.
steps.claude_code_command: claude run 'add try-catch block with toast notification to onboarding submit handler'

steps.title: Deployment & Performance Audit
steps.description: Optimize the bundle size and deploy to Vercel to show off your live work.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Provide a checklist for optimizing React bundle size and pre-fetching onboarding assets.
steps.claude_code_command: claude run 'audit bundle size and suggest code splitting for onboarding module'

pro_tips: Always include a 'Skip' option in onboarding; forced flows increase churn and make you look like an amateur.
Use analytics tracking tags on every step to prove to clients you care about data-driven UX.
Record a 30-second Loom video explaining your architectural choices for the onboarding flow; this sells better than the code itself.
Implement 'optimistic UI' updates so the onboarding feels instantaneous to the user, regardless of network speed.
Modularize your onboarding CSS into Tailwind utility classes to make the component drop-in ready for any client's existing codebase.
content.next_steps: Once the onboarding flow is live, document the 'Why' behind your architectural decisions in a README, add it to your GitHub profile, and link it in your freelance proposals.
content.conversion_block: Stop waiting for the perfect project to fall into your lap. Build the portfolio that demands premium rates today. Ready to build? Join our AI Builder community → Start your first project today.
